<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep this short — delete anything that doesn't apply. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / component
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm size` all pass locally
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits with a lowercase subject
- [ ] A `pnpm changeset` is included for any user-facing change
- [ ] New/changed components are token-driven, accessible, SSR-safe, and documented with a live example
- [ ] Verified in both light and dark themes (for visual changes)
